name: Herbed Garlic Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the margarine over medium heat.
2. Add the oregano and cook for about 1 minute to soften the seasoning.
3. Stir in the bread cubes and sauté until browned and crisp.
4. Scatter the croutons on top of soups or salads just before serving.
Makes 2 cups.
VARIATIONS: For an alternative method, cut the bread into cubes, spread them on an ungreased baking sheet, and toast at 400°F (200°C) for about 10 minutes, turning occasionally. Store in a tin at room temperature for up to 1-2 days. Some crispness may be lost if stored in a plastic container. Reheat and crisp in a 350°F (175°C) oven for 5 minutes.
